opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Roommate reports] He fell and hit his head really hard, was knocked out cold, and now he keeps throwing up and asking the same questions over and over.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe head trauma with loss of consciousness, resulting in ongoing confusion, repetitive vomiting, and unequal pupils.

symptom_narrative.onset: 30 minutes ago, fell backward off a retaining wall and struck the back of his head on concrete
symptom_narrative.character: severe, worsening headache at the back of the head
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: briefly knocked out for about 2 minutes, can't remember what happened, repeatedly asking the same questions, three episodes of forceful vomiting in the last 15 minutes
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: none, first occurrence, follows a fall from about 1.5 metres
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: lying on the couch, highly lethargic and confused, unable to sit up without severe dizziness/vomiting

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: no known blood thinners; roommate present and providing history due to the patient's confusion

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: roommate concerned and wants clear direction
